SWIPE
GENRE
私の書棚
原文
-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } :root { --dur: .48s; --ease: cubic-bezier(.76,0,.24,1); } html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #050505; font-family: 'Shippori Mincho', serif; touch-action: none; user-select: none; -webkit-user-select: none; } /* PC：中央に固定幅で表示 */ #app { position: fixed; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 100%; max-width: 480px; /* PC時に左右に微かな影でスマホ感を演出 */ box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(0,0,0,.8); } /* PC背景：グリッド模様で奥行き感 */ body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.015) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,.015) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; } /* ============================== DECK: カードスタック ============================== */ #deck { position: absolute; inset: 0; } /* ============================== CARD ============================== */ .card { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; will-change: transform, opacity; transform: translateY(100vh); transition: transform var(--dur) var(--ease), opacity var(--dur) ease; opacity: 0; /* カード内の縦スクロールを許可 */ overflow-y: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } .card.is-current { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } .card.is-above { transform: translateY(-100vh); opacity: 0; } .card.is-drag { transition: none; } /* ============================== CARD BG — ジャンルごとの世界観 ============================== */ .card-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; } /* ジャンル別カラースキーム */ .card[data-g="純文学"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a1614 0%, #2d2118 40%, #1a1614 100%); } .card[data-g="探偵・推理"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0d1520 0%, #102035 40%, #0d1520 100%); } .card[data-g="怪談・怪異"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #120d1a 0%, #1e1228 40%, #120d1a 100%); } .card[data-g="恋愛・情念"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a0d10 0%, #2a1018 40%, #1a0d10 100%); } .card[data-g="歴史・時代"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #160f08 0%, #261808 40%, #160f08 100%); } .card[data-g="幻想・耽美"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0d1a14 0%, #102614 40%, #0d1a14 100%); } .card[data-g="社会・風俗"] .card-bg { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #101614 0%, #152018 40%, #101614 100%); } /* ノイズ感 */ .card-bg::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); background-size: 200px; opacity: .5; pointer-events: none; } /* ============================== GENRE ACCENT LINE ============================== */ .card-accent { position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; top: 0; height: 2px; z-index: 10; } .card[data-g="純文学"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #c4621a, #e8a04a, transparent); } .card[data-g="探偵・推理"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a6090, #4a9cc8, transparent); } .card[data-g="怪談・怪異"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6a2090, #a050d0, transparent); } .card[data-g="恋愛・情念"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #902040, #d04070, transparent); } .card[data-g="歴史・時代"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8a5010, #c88030, transparent); } .card[data-g="幻想・耽美"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a7a40, #30b060, transparent); } .card[data-g="社会・風俗"] .card-accent { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a6a40, #40a060, transparent); } /* ============================== TOP META ============================== */ .card-top { position: relative; z-index: 10; padding: 52px 28px 0; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; flex-shrink: 0; } .meta-genre { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; } .genre-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; opacity: .45; } .card[data-g="純文学"] .genre-name { color: #e8a04a; } .card[data-g="探偵・推理"] .genre-name { color: #4a9cc8; } .card[data-g="怪談・怪異"] .genre-name { color: #a050d0; } .card[data-g="恋愛・情念"] .genre-name { color: #d04070; } .card[data-g="歴史・時代"] .genre-name { color: #c88030; } .card[data-g="幻想・耽美"] .genre-name { color: #30b060; } .card[data-g="社会・風俗"] .genre-name { color: #40a060; } .pattern-name { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.2); } .meta-counter { font-family: 'IM Fell English', serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.18); letter-spacing: 1px; } /* ============================== MAIN TEXT AREA ============================== */ .card-text-wrap { flex: 1; position: relative; z-index: 5; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 24px 20px 20px; overflow-y: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } .card-text { writing-mode: vertical-rl; text-orientation: mixed; font-family: 'Zen Old Mincho', 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: clamp(17px, 4.5vw, 22px); line-height: 2.1; letter-spacing: .12em; color: rgba(240, 228, 210, .88); /* 全文表示 */ height: auto; overflow: visible; } /* ============================== BOTTOM INFO ============================== */ .card-bottom { position: relative; z-index: 10; padding: 0 28px 40px; flex-shrink: 0; } .card-divider { height: 1px; margin-bottom: 16px; opacity: .12; } .card[data-g="純文学"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #e8a04a, transparent); } .card[data-g="探偵・推理"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4a9cc8, transparent); } .card[data-g="怪談・怪異"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a050d0, transparent); } .card[data-g="恋愛・情念"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #d04070, transparent); } .card[data-g="歴史・時代"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #c88030, transparent); } .card[data-g="幻想・耽美"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #30b060, transparent); } .card[data-g="社会・風俗"] .card-divider { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #40a060, transparent); } .card-author-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; gap: 12px; } .author-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .author-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(240,228,210,.82); letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .work-title { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(240,228,210,.3); letter-spacing: 1px; } .card-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .btn-src { background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); font-family: 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: 10px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: all .2s; letter-spacing: 1px; } .btn-src:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); color: rgba(255,255,255,.6); } .btn-lend { background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15); color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); font-family: 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: 11px; padding: 7px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s; letter-spacing: 1px; } .btn-lend:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); } .btn-lend.is-lent { background: rgba(200,100,40,.15); border-color: rgba(200,120,40,.5); color: #e8a04a; } /* ============================== SWIPE HINT ============================== */ #swipe-hint { position: absolute; bottom: 48px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 200; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; pointer-events: none; animation: hintOut 1s ease 2.5s forwards; } .hint-arrows { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; animation: hintBounce 1s ease infinite; } .hint-arr { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.2); line-height: 1; } .hint-arr:first-child { opacity: .4; } .hint-txt { font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 4px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.15); } @keyframes hintBounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(4px); } } @keyframes hintOut { to { opacity: 0; } } /* ============================== FIXED UI ============================== */ /* フィルターボタン */ #btn-filter { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 300; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius: 50%; color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all .2s; touch-action: manipulation; } #btn-filter:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); } /* 書棚ボタン */ #btn-shelf { position: absolute; top: 64px; right: 20px; z-index: 300; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius: 50%; color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all .2s; touch-action: manipulation; } #btn-shelf:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); } .shelf-badge { position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px; width: 16px; height: 16px; background: #c4621a; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 9px; color: #fff; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: sans-serif; } /* インジケーター */ #progress { position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); z-index: 200; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; pointer-events: none; } .prog-dot { width: 2px; height: 2px; border-radius: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.18); transition: all .3s ease; } .prog-dot.on { height: 18px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.45); } /* ============================== FILTER DRAWER ============================== */ #filter-drawer { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 400; pointer-events: none; } #filter-drawer.open { pointer-events: all; } #filter-backdrop { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,.5); opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s; } #filter-drawer.open #filter-backdrop { opacity: 1; } #filter-panel { position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; width: min(280px, 80vw); background: #111; border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); padding: 60px 24px 40px; transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform .35s var(--ease); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } #filter-drawer.open #filter-panel { transform: translateX(0); } .filter-label { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 4px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.2); margin-bottom: 8px; } .f-item { background: none; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05); color: rgba(255,255,255,.35); font-family: 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 0; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; letter-spacing: 2px; transition: color .18s; touch-action: manipulation; } .f-item:active, .f-item.on { color: rgba(255,255,255,.85); } .f-item.on::before { content: '— '; color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); } /* ============================== SHELF：全画面リーダー ============================== */ #shelf-drawer { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 400; pointer-events: none; } #shelf-drawer.open { pointer-events: all; } #shelf-panel { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #0d0d0d; transform: translateY(100%); transition: transform .4s var(--ease); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } #shelf-drawer.open #shelf-panel { transform: translateY(0); } .shelf-hd { padding: 52px 24px 16px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05); flex-shrink: 0; } .shelf-ttl { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 4px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); } .shelf-close { background: none; border: none; color: rgba(255,255,255,.25); font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; touch-action: manipulation; padding: 4px; } /* 書棚：作品リスト ↔ 全文ビュー の2画面 */ #shelf-list-view, #shelf-reader-view { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } #shelf-reader-view { display: none; } .shelf-bd { overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px 24px 40px; flex: 1; } .shelf-empty { text-align: center; color: rgba(255,255,255,.15); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; padding: 52px 0; line-height: 3; } /* リストアイテム */ .s-item { padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; cursor: pointer; } .s-item:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,.02); } .s-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .s-ttl { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.65); margin-bottom: 4px; letter-spacing: 1px; } .s-auth { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.2); letter-spacing: 1px; } .s-arrow { color: rgba(255,255,255,.15); font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; } /* リーダービュー */ .reader-hd { padding: 16px 24px 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05); flex-shrink: 0; } .reader-back { background: none; border: none; color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; touch-action: manipulation; padding: 4px 8px 4px 0; } .reader-meta { flex: 1; } .reader-title { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.6); letter-spacing: 1px; } .reader-author { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.25); letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 2px; } .reader-acts { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } .reader-src { background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); font-family: 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: 9px; padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; letter-spacing: 1px; touch-action: manipulation; } .reader-ret { background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(200,100,40,.3); color: rgba(200,120,40,.6); font-family: 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: 9px; padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; touch-action: manipulation; letter-spacing: 1px; } .reader-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden; padding: 24px 20px 40px; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } .reader-text { writing-mode: vertical-rl; font-family: 'Zen Old Mincho', 'Shippori Mincho', serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 2.1; letter-spacing: .1em; color: rgba(240,228,210,.78); height: 100%; min-height: calc(100vw - 40px); }
